survivors_neutral.speaker: Maya
lines: We don't get many strangers out here who aren't trying to eat us.
Name's Maya. We're holed up nearby. What do you want?

choices.text: I'd like to help your group.

survivors_friendly.speaker: Maya
lines: Good to see you're still alive.
Things have been rough lately. The horde to the east is getting bigger.
If you're heading that way, watch yourself.

survivors_allied.speaker: Maya
lines: You've done more for us than most. We owe you one.
Camp's yours anytime you need rest. Take whatever you need from the supply box.

survivors_hostile.speaker: Maya
lines: Get out of here before my people put you down.
